lines.speaker: Louie Legs
lines.text: I provide items to help you keep your legs!

lines.speaker: Louie Legs
lines.text: This is just what I needed for my special secret... err... I've said too much! Take this and get out of here quickly!

sections.title: Using Al kharid flyer on Louie Legs

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi! I have this money off voucher!

lines.speaker: Louie Legs
lines.text: So I see! Unfortunately it seems to have expired yesterday! Nevermind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I only just got it!

lines.speaker: Louie Legs
lines.text: I'm sorry, there's nothing I can do.
